expectations.evidence: Agent created Hero.tsx, Hero.module.css, index.ts, lib/data/hero.ts in worktree

expectations.text: no-invented-css: CSS values obtained from getComputedStyle, not guessed
expectations.evidence: Agent grep'd CSS source files directly but did NOT use getComputedStyle/preview_eval. Values may diverge from actual computed result due to cascade/specificity.

expectations.text: qa-screenshots-taken: Screenshots of source and implementation compared
expectations.evidence: No screenshots taken. Verification was 'tsc --noEmit' only — type checking does not confirm visual fidelity.

expectations.text: use-client-correct: use client added only when necessary
expectations.evidence: Agent added 'use client' to Hero.tsx despite no hooks or browser APIs. Unnecessary client boundary.

expectations.text: source-extraction-before-code: HTML structure and computed styles extracted before writing code
expectations.evidence: Agent went straight to reading CSS files and writing code — no getComputedStyle, no outerHTML inspection, no preview_eval calls.
